# Contributing

Contributions are welcome and accepted via pull requests on GitHub.

## Guidelines

- Follow the [PSR-12](https://www.php-fig.org/psr/psr-12/) coding standard. Run
  `composer format` (Laravel Pint) before committing.
- Keep static analysis green: `composer analyse` (PHPStan).
- Add tests for any new behaviour and make sure the suite passes: `composer test`.
- One feature/fix per pull request, with a clear description.
- Use [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) for commit
  messages (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `test:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`).

**Happy coding!**
